data.title: A Year After Tesla's First Cybertruck Deliveries, The Truck Has A Long Way To Go To Meet Elon Musk's Goals
data.description: EV giant Tesla started delivering the Cybertruck to customers in the U.S. a year ago on Nov. 30, 2023.

data.title: Trump Media (DJT) Stock Surges In Premarket As Trump Taps Board Member Kash Patel For FBI Leadership
data.description: Trump Media stock surged over 2% in premarket trading on Monday after President-elect Donald Trump picked Kashyap "Kash" Patel to lead FBI.
